reviews.review_description: This game does a lot of cool stuff with mixed reality. Gameplay really uses your actual space, characters jump off your couch, you bounce balls off your TV. You feel good with moving around your room fully, unlike a regular VR game where you worry about hitting a wall or furniture that you can't see. Gameplay starts off pretty simple, but the game keeps layering on wacky elements and unexpected twists. There's a lot to try. It's easy to lose yourself in the action, and embrace the silly chaos!

reviews.review_title: 🔥 Setting a New Standard for MR Gaming
reviews.review_description:
Mega Fireball is an absolute blast — a Mixed Reality gem that nails everything a great game should have. With its mix of solo missions, same-room multiplayer, and online matches, it’s packed with replayability and social fun.

The responsiveness is exceptional — punches, blocks, and interactions register instantly, making the gameplay feel smooth and natural. The variety in solo missions keeps things exciting, from intense lava levels and chaotic AI fights to precision shooting challenges and guiding your buddy Slappy for slam dunks.

Visually, it’s a vibrant feast of color, complemented by upbeat, perfectly matched music. Beyond its entertainment value, Mega Fireball is also a solid fitness experience — you’ll be moving constantly as you master each mode and climb the global leaderboard.

This game doesn’t just entertain — it raises the bar for what MR can deliver. A must-try for anyone looking for fast-paced fun, competition, and creative gameplay.

developer_response.body: Woah, what a review! Thank you so much

reviews.review_description: The best looking mixed reality game I have played so far. The game causes chaos around my room while attempting to score. Many will greatly enjoy this chaos but for me, an older player, the chaos is a little too much. Note, I received a free key for my honest review.

This game is the perfect for mixed-reality.  
It's basically a chaotic sports game where your living room suddenly becomes this weird futuristic court. You're punching these balls at a goal, and the best part is seeing all the action happening right next to you.  Game is best when playing against others but I love that it has individual challenges in one mode too.  I hope more challenges come along.

I just played Mega Fireball on my Meta Quest, and this game completely blew me away! 🤯
The Mixed-Reality gameplay is next-level — fast, creative, and insanely fun. Definitely one of the most exciting MR games I’ve ever played on Quest! 💥 I will do more videos of this !!!!!

⭐ Rating: 10/10

developer_response.body: Would love to see some more videos! Thanks Antonio

reviews.review_title: Party Active Chaotic fun for everyone
reviews.review_description:
I think tech like this is awesome. Its so cool to see new games push the boundaries of what's possible with mixed reality. 

I also play a lot of fitness games and this gets your heart pumping! This is the type of game I want to show my family and friends - so not just for solo fitness. It feels like a new type of sport.

Music is very fun and energetic. Controlling Slappy feels fun and a bit challenging at first, but definitely want to explore that more.

reviews.review_title: Super fun and runs great on Quest 2
reviews.review_description: Slappy Rules! The game feels great, and it’s really fun to control or just watch your little buddy run around your room. It's one of those games that you'll appreciate your headset for, and show off to your friends. I loved the puzzle levels, and this just feels like the makers of the game like playing it too. You can tell they thought about how to make something that would be fun no matter the room you're in. Only small issue is some of the menus can be a little tricky to navigate. Overall, I would say you should get this game!

I've been playing for a couple hours and loving it so far. At first I was a bit overwhelmed by all the movement with walking in the room whilst controlling the small character but once you got the hang of it you'll be having a great time!!

This game is so fun and interactive! Everyone I’ve seen play (including myself) has the best time and it’s not only entertaining for the player, the people watching the player have fun too! Really good graphics and no major issues! 10/10

developer_response.body: Awesome! Thanks for the kind words

reviews.review_description: This game was surprisingly fun once I got the hang of it. Did a quick room scan and it works well in my medium sized space. My favorite levels are the ones where you control Slappy (helper bot) as it jumps around on the objects or furniture in your room.

Mega Fireball is a great showcase what fun and innovative usage of MR should look like. It is a colourful, fast and chaotic sport game right in our living room. Together with your awesome cuddly assistant Slappy you try everything to score goals, collect coins, turn the balls into fireballs and much more is going on 😂 it is quirky and fun, the Soundtrack is great and pushing and it is a great workout. Please make sure that you remove expensive stuff and your children out of the play area 😋 

Great usage of MR dear devs btw - it really looked that my living room is on fire which gave me the chills 🙂 Such a cool and fun game. 

I really felt motivated to break my own highscore and the highscore of my friends on the leaderboard. 

At that price really a great Addition to every quest game collection.

One of the best mixed reality games I have played. App does a great job with the room scan and tutorial. Good variance of gameplay, with different levels and styles of games. Very crisp, bright graphics. Worth every penny!
I got" Error 02: no scanned room found", but was quickly able to fix this with help from the developer. Thanks for the fast response!

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you're having this issue! Please try the following steps. You can also chat with us on Discord if you need more support!

1) Make sure you've scanned the room you're playing in
2) Make sure Mega Fireball has the permissions to view your scanned rooms
3) If both 1 and 2 are right, rescan the room you are playing in
4) Restart your headset
5) Uninstall and reinstall

reviews.review_description: I've been playing and it's so fun going 1 on 1 with your friends! We were literally crying laughing lol. If you like VR party games, VR sports Mega Fireball is the game for sure!!

developer_response.body: Woo thanks for the kind words

reviews.review_description: It's a quite fun little physics-based MR game with a lot of variation. Having your little alien friend jump around on tables and chairs is a neat way of mixing the real world and the game world. I quite enjoy it!
This game looks great and its physics are super responsible, you really feel if you hit the ball. It's also great for exercise or, if you need help, call for Slappy your little companion.
Really novel use of turning the room scan into an accurate play space. It's amazing that Slappy can run around perfectly on chairs and under tables!

developer_response.body: Glad you're having fun with Slappy!

reviews.review_description: love the lava mode. add more levels!
My son absolutely loves this game and is has chasing the ball around the house.

developer_response.body: Glad to hear your son is having fun!

reviews.review_description: Stuck with roomscale error. Cant start

developer_response.body:
Hey vikslit! I think we were able to connect with you on Reddit. In case you're still having issues:

1. Make sure you've scanned the room youre playing in
2. Make sure Mega Fireball has the permissions to view your scanned rooms
3. If both 1 and 2 are right, rescan the room you are playing in
4. Restart your headset
5. Uninstall and reinstall

reviews.review_description:
Love that the game adapts to the space around me and utilizes the physical objects as part of the gameplay experience.  And, just by moving into a different area of my house, I was able to get a diferent experience each time - super cool!  

The gameplay is smooth and super responsive, even when the pace of things increases and all the different virtual elements start moving around like crazy!

developer_response.body: Playing in different rooms is the best! Glad you're having fun

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing! My daughter is absolutely crazy about it! I tried it too and it's really fantastic, especially in multiplayer. We laugh a lot! and this is the most important thing, this game puts a smile on our faces. Thank you to the game developers for creating such a game!

developer_response.body: This review puts a smile on our face

reviews.review_description: Great game.  This one i will be playing often with my family.  it looks and feels great.  They got the bounce physics down nicely to make it play so well.  thanks again for bring more fun games for us to play.  And if others are reading this still, it is worth the price, we really enjoy playing it.

reviews.review_title: Mega Fireball Is Pure MR Chaos
reviews.review_description: Mega Fireball is an entertaining MR party game - perfect for showing off your headset to friends, competing, and turning your room into chaotic fun for all the family. Not every moment is polished — but the fun is undeniable. See my gameplay here: https://youtu.be/Vqp97XXjITM

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review and the video! Glad you had fun

reviews.review_description:
It's so fun to play. It looks awesome and the idea behind it is something fresh, something new, I like that. One of the best MR games I've played so far because it really shows what MR stands for and what it's capable of. 
10/10, would recommend.
a fun mix of soccer, fallguys, basketball and the floor is lava.
